instruction: The red horizontal strikethrough on the user circle icon faces the wrong way. Mirror it back.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/user-circle.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17.982 18.725A7.488 7.488 0 0 0 12 15.75a7.488 7.488 0 0 0-5.982 2.975m11.963 0a9 9 0 1 0-11.963 0m11.963 0A8.966 8.966 0 0 1 12 21a8.966 8.966 0 0 1-5.982-2.275M15 9.75a3 3 0 1 1-6 0 3 3 0 0 1 6 0Z"/></g>
  <line id="overstrike" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" x1="112" y1="64" x2="16" y2="64" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/user-circle.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17.982 18.725A7.488 7.488 0 0 0 12 15.75a7.488 7.488 0 0 0-5.982 2.975m11.963 0a9 9 0 1 0-11.963 0m11.963 0A8.966 8.966 0 0 1 12 21a8.966 8.966 0 0 1-5.982-2.275M15 9.75a3 3 0 1 1-6 0 3 3 0 0 1 6 0Z"/></g>
  <line id="overstrike" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" x1="16" y1="64" x2="112" y2="64" />
</svg>
